name: integratedgov-ai
description: IntegratedGov AI — NyayMitra + PanchayatGPT unified rural governance platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server,ai -c cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server" "cd ai-service && python -m uvicorn main:app --port 8000"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
